input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.12.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.12.1
            TITLE: objective

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.12.1: Objective
IN.12.1 Objective 
The brake system will be dynamically tested and must demonstrate the capability of locking all 
four wheels when stopping the vehicle in a straight line at the end of an acceleration run 
specified by the brake inspectors

final_answer: The brake system will be dynamically tested and must demonstrate the capability of locking all four wheels when stopping the vehicle in a straight line at the end of an acceleration run specified by the brake inspectors
